description: This schematic diagram illustrates the mapping criteria for a linear feature with a local constriction, which is classified as "1.2.2.3". The feature has a consistent width of 10 m at its wider sections. Within the diagram, a segment of the feature narrows temporarily, and the length of this constricted segment is indicated as "≤ 50 m". The label "Mapped as 1.2.2.3" indicates that despite this temporary narrowing, the feature is considered a continuous entity and retains its classification, likely due to meeting minimum mapping unit (MMU) requirements for linear features within the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) Urban Atlas product.
